raspberrypi-boot-gdata/src/main/java/de/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Arrays.asList() with List.of() to align with modern Java collection practices.
Remove the unused java.util.Arrays import after switching to List.of().

raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent from 2.4.5 to 2.6.1 to align with newer framework features and security patches.
Set the project's Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the newer JDK.
Update jackson-databind dependency from 2.12.3 to 2.12.5 for bug fixes and compatibility.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the Spring Boot starter parent version from 2.4.5 to 2.6.1 to support newer dependencies and Java versions.
Update the Google API Services OAuth2 dependency to a newer patch version.
Add the Google HTTP Client Jackson2 dependency to handle JSON serialization for Google APIs.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the project's target Java version from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Update the Spring Boot starter parent version from 2.4.5 to 2.6.1 to support newer dependencies and Java versions.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 8 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the Spring Boot starter parent version from 2.4.5 to 2.6.1 to support newer dependencies and Java versions.
Replace manual Reactor and Netty dependencies with the unified Spring Boot starter for Reactor Netty.
Remove the explicit reactor-core dependency as it is now managed by the Spring Boot starter.
Remove the explicit reactor-net dependency as it is superseded by the Spring Boot starter.
Remove the explicit netty-all dependency as it is now managed by the Spring Boot starter.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 17 instead of JDK 15 to align with the project's target Java version.
.github/workflows/maven.yml.human_impl: Changed 'Set up JDK 15' to 'Set up JDK 17' and 'java-version: 15' to 'java-version: 17' in .github/workflows/maven.yml

raspberrypi-boot-server/src/main/resourc.general_idea: Replace local jQuery 1.10.2 with a CDN-hosted jQuery 3.6.0 to modernize the frontend library version.
